message:
style: apply rustfmt to 4 conformance test files

Reformat ad_numerical_verification.rs, control_flow_conformance.rs,
dtype_promotion_oracle_parity.rs, and egraph_preserves_semantics.rs
to satisfy rustfmt conventions:

- Collapse short argument lists onto fewer lines where they fit
- Break long assert! macro invocations into multi-line form
- Reflow chained iterator expressions for line-width compliance
- Normalize array literal formatting

No logic changes — formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
